en: The world's on fire, but I'm like, let's get silly with it, you know?
ko: 세상이 불타고 있지만, 나는 이렇게 생각해,

en: I came out as bisexual on Facebook. Stop.
I don't want to hear it. Stop now. And I called my dad, and I gave him the whole speech.
He took a long pause, and he goes, buddy, if you're just going to come out
as full gay in six months, can we skip to that part?
Yeah, yeah, we can. As a kid, I was so uptight.
When I was 15, I asked for a business suit.
He had no business to speak of. Sorry, I'm bigger than this small town.
I don't respect straight guys as a rule.
The only straight guy I've really ever truly respected in my life is a guy I overheard at a bar once.
And he goes, no, no, dude, I'm telling you.
ko: 그는 이렇게 말했어, 아니, 아니, 친구야, 내가 말하는 거 들어봐.

en: I just tell girls I can't come from blowjobs, and it makes them want to give me blowjobs even worse.
ko: 나는 여자들에게 구강 성교로는 오지 못한다고 말해.

en: Genius, genius, a beautiful mind montage.
I just picture him outside of a nightclub every weekend painting a fence white.
ko: 나는 그가 매주 주말 클럽 밖에서 하얀 울타리를 칠하는 모습을 상상해.

en: Sure would love to come from head.
Seems nobody around here has what it takes.
ko: 여기서는 그런 걸 할 수 있는 사람이 없는 것 같아.
